Class ProjectContextProvider

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.agi.context.BasicContextProvider
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.context.AbstractProjectContextProvider
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.context.ProjectContextProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
ContextProvider, PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
public class ProjectContextProvider extends AbstractProjectContextProvider
A hierarchical context provider for a specific NetBeans project. Consolidates metadata, actions, dependencies, and project-specific instructions (anahata.md).
Author:
anahata

  • Constructor Details

    • ProjectContextProvider

      public ProjectContextProvider(Projects projectsToolkit, org.netbeans.api.project.Project project)
      Constructs a new project context provider.

      Implementation details: Initializes project-specific child providers (Structure, Alerts) and triggers initial anahata.md synchronization. Legacy structural providers (Files, Components) are currently disabled in favor of the unified Structure provider.

      Parameters:
      projectsToolkit - The parent Projects toolkit.
      project - The NetBeans project instance.

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the human-readable name of this context provider.

      Returns the dynamic display name of the NetBeans project as retrieved from ProjectUtils.

      Returns:
      The provider's name.

    • setProviding

      public void setProviding(boolean enabled)
      Toggles the providing status and triggers a recursive IDE visual refresh.

      Implementation details: When the state changes, it identifies the project's root FileObject and notifies the IDE that icons and names in the project tree should be redrawn to reflect the current context state.

      Toggles the providing state and triggers a synchronization of the anahata.md resource with the session's resource manager.

      Specified by:
      setProviding in interface ContextProvider
      Overrides:
      setProviding in class AbstractProjectContextProvider
      Parameters:
      enabled - The new activation state.

    • populateMessage

      public void populateMessage(RagMessage ragMessage) throws Exception
      Populates the given RagMessage with dynamic, just-in-time context parts. These parts are appended to the end of the user's prompt (RAG).

      Fetches a fresh ProjectOverview and appends its Markdown representation to the RAG message.

      Parameters:
      ragMessage - The message to be augmented with context.
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs during context generation.

    • syncMdResource

      private void syncMdResource()
      Synchronizes the anahata.md file with the agi's resource manager. Uses path-based lookup to honor manual user unloads.

    • generateMarkdown

      private String generateMarkdown(ProjectOverview overview)
      Generates a Markdown string representing the project overview.
      Parameters:
      overview - The project overview model snapshot.
      Returns:
      A pretty Markdown representation.

    • formatDependencyScope

      private String formatDependencyScope(DependencyScope scope, String indent)
      Formats a declared Maven dependency scope structure into a Markdown listing.
      Parameters:
      scope - The dependency scope to format.
      indent - The string indentation format prefix.
      Returns:
      A pretty Markdown listing of group-artifacts.
